src/test/java/com/example/chat/Applicati.general_idea: Migrate JUnit 4 annotations and imports to JUnit 5 (Jupiter) equivalents.
src/test/java/com/example/chat/Applicati.why_exists: JUnit 4 classes (org.junit.Test, org.junit.runner.RunWith) are not part of the default Spring Boot 3.3 test dependencies which use JUnit 5; using them causes compilation errors or missing class runtime failures.
